text:
On Tue, Mar 5, 2013 at 6:00 PM, Ruslan Makhmatkhanov <cvs-src@yandex.ru> wr=
ote:
>
> Checked them all. Only three needs patching:
> ./www/py-rhodecode
> ./devel/py-celery
> ./devel/py-TGScheduler
>
> All the other do not have strict dependency on 1.5 (or just define !2.0) =
or do not need dateutil at all like devel/py-mwlib (patch sent to maintaine=
r). Please fix two of your ports and I will deal with py-TGScheduler. That'=
s will be all that's needed :)


I have only one, rhodecode, celery is not mine (although I could
maintain that one as well). However I was waiting for ports/175372
before doing so.
